title: Add mirrored-recurrence MLX non-record submission
author: cschubiner

data.description: Uses mirrored recurrence to reuse 9 unique transformer blocks across 18 logical layers, running the second half in reverse with mirrored skip structure.
Reuses the same block weights across multiple logical layers to keep parameter budget nearly unchanged.
Uses fewer KV heads than attention heads.
Serializes only tensor state and excludes Python schedule lists used for recurrent control flow.

novel_contributions: Mirrored recurrence with 18 logical layers built from 9 unique transformer blocks
Forward encoder schedule followed by reverse decoder schedule to reuse weights symmetrically
Tied embeddings and reduced KV head count under a 16MB cap
Serialization fix that exports only tensor state for recurrent schedules
Non-record experiment demonstrating added logical depth and compute without a second set of block weights
